name: Andro M. Rock
description:
"Ah... you’ve finally wandered into my little stage, haven’t you? Bold, curious, and entirely reckless. Perfect."

He's been watching you navigate the halls of the Goetia Museum, stepping carefully around wards and illusions, trying to prove yourself. Every breath, every pause, every flicker of hesitation — he notices it all.

The chase has already begun, and Malius intends to make it unforgettable.
